title: Re-Opening of Establishment. A Motion to Re-open an Establishment
content: 15 subject of a Closure Order may only be filed by the following: 16 17 a. The owner of the building or the latter’s duly authorized representative; 18 19 b. The building administrator or the latter’s duly authorized representative; 20 21 c. The person or entity against whom the closure order was issued and 22 implemented or the duly authorized representative; or 23 24 d. Any other person or entity legitimately operating within the premises 25 closed/padlocked and whose operations/activities are distinct from the 26 recruitment activities of the person/entity subject of the closure order. 27 28
